metadata.description: Cognitive training games for memory, attention and reaction speed.

auth.summary: Save your scores, track your streak and compete on the neural leaderboard.

errors.retry: Review the form data and try again.

app.dailyChallengeDone: Challenge complete. You mastered Neural Prime today.

mathRush.name: Math Rush

gridMemory.name: Grid Memory
gridMemory.description: Memorize the position of the tiles shown on screen.

stroopTest.name: Color Conflict
stroopTest.description: Identify the word color while ignoring the written text.

shapeStack.name: Mental Rotation
shapeStack.description: Decide whether rotated shapes are identical.

patternPursuit.name: Pattern Pursuit
patternPursuit.description: Find the odd icon in the grid as quickly as possible.

neuralReact.name: Neural React
neuralReact.description: Test your reaction speed. Click as soon as the color changes.
